The origin

One photo. One slide.

It started with an ordinary post. A grandmother in Japan tried to photograph a flower and caught her cat instead. Frozen mid-slide across the dirt, paws splayed, eyes to the sky.

The internet did the rest. Over 200 million views, 1.5M+ likes and 200K+ reposts, becoming one of the most-loved animal posts X has ever seen.

No team, no campaign, no roadmap. Just a genuinely funny cat the whole timeline fell for at once. The rarest thing in the trenches: a real, organic meme.

Original moment by @maid_Pelori

View the original post
The gallery

It memes itself.

You can't fake organic. Within days the timeline was redrawing him in every format it could imagine: watercolor, oil, manga, stadium lights. Every piece here was made by the community.

How to buy

Four steps.

一

Get a wallet

Install a Solana wallet like Phantom or Solflare.

二

Fund it

Buy SOL on any exchange and send it to your wallet.

三

Buy on pump.fun

Open pump.fun, paste the CA, and swap SOL for $SLIDINGCAT.

四

Slide in

Set the cat as your pfp and join the community.

Sliding Cat (滑る猫 / $SLIDINGCAT) is a meme coin created for cultural and entertainment purposes. It has no intrinsic value, no team making promises, and no expectation of financial return. Crypto is highly volatile and most meme coins go to zero. Do your own research and never spend more than you can afford to lose. Nothing here is financial advice.
